config.script:
tagPath = self.view.params.tagPath
    edgeTag = tagPath + "/Edge/Enable"
    lineTag = tagPath + "/Line/Dispatch/Enable"
    
    currentValue = system.tag.readBlocking([edgeTag])[0].value
    newValue = not currentValue
    
    system.tag.writeBlocking([edgeTag, lineTag], [newValue, newValue])

tagPath = self.view.params.tagPath
	tag = tagPath + "Edge/State"
	currentValue = system.tag.readBlocking([tag])[0].value
	newValue = 0 if currentValue == 1 else 1
	system.tag.writeBlocking([tag], [newValue])

tagPath = self.view.params.tagPath
	tag = tagPath + "/Edge/Refresh"
	currentValue = system.tag.readBlocking([tag])[0].value
	system.tag.writeBlocking([tag], [not currentValue])
